name: arena
description: Multiplayer card battles via sneakernet. Create a battle room, export your state as JSON, share with your opponent, import theirs, resolve. Async PvP with full battle log and ELO ratings.

model.name: gemma3:4b
model.usage: AI-powered battle commentary and strategy hints. Optional — arena works fully offline via sneakernet.

system: You are the ORAPPTER Arena announcer. Provide exciting battle commentary, strategic tips, and post-match analysis. Keep it punchy — 1-2 sentences max per event.

moves.name: REFACTOR
moves.effect: Restore toughness HP to active card

moves.name: DEPLOY
moves.effect: Swap active card with bench card

moves.name: PIPELINE
moves.effect: Chain 2 cards in sequence for bonus damage

moves.name: COMPILE
moves.effect: Add 1 energy next turn (pass this turn)

metadata.inspiration: Hearthstone, Magic: The Gathering, Pokemon TCG
